variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14050 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14050 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14050 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 195.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 105.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 100.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 710.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 665.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 30.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson X770088 Air Filter, Primary Duralite | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14050
variants.option1Value: Donaldson X770088 Air Filter, Primary Duralite | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14050
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson DuraLite™ Air Cleaners? Rugged, lightweight, self-supporting, and completely disposable combination air cleaner and filter. • Function well under severe pulsation conditions, particularly two- and three-cylinder engines. • Vibration-resistant media is secured into molded housings of rugged ABS plastic—so they don’t fall apart as other designs might. • Easy to install, durable, and reliable. • Completely disposable — acceptable for normal trash pick-up (DuraLite should not be incinerated).

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4100 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14050
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4100 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14050
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4100 air filter offers more filtering surface than standard air filters, is located above the engine to draw cool, clean air, needs less maintenance time and cost, and has easy filter removal.
